runners.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when he finished last over 350m at this track beaten 10 lengths (20.41) behind Fire Me Up in a Free For All on April 5. Forward showing expected.

formComments.comment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when he finished last over 350m at this track beaten 10 lengths (20.41) behind Fire Me Up in a Free For All on April 5. Forward showing expected.

runners.formComment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Casino over 411m. Hard to envisage a win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Casino over 411m. Hard to envisage a win.

runners.formComment: Could manage only seventh last time but turned heads the start prior when she recorded a flying 25.19 over 450m finishing second at this track. Has the ability and looks a key chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could manage only seventh last time but turned heads the start prior when she recorded a flying 25.19 over 450m finishing second at this track. Has the ability and looks a key chance.

runners.formComment: Form has been strong, including a victory two starts back. Last time out finished 2nd over 350m at this track beaten 0.8 lengths (20.34) behind Rocky Pepper in a NG on April 7. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been strong, including a victory two starts back. Last time out finished 2nd over 350m at this track beaten 0.8 lengths (20.34) behind Rocky Pepper in a NG on April 7. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

runners.formComment: Placed last time (17.55) at Taree Super Track in a Mix 1/2/3, finishing second and beaten 4 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting five victories and seven places from 16 starts. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Placed last time (17.55) at Taree Super Track in a Mix 1/2/3, finishing second and beaten 4 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting five victories and seven places from 16 starts. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Forced to race wider on the track, on the home turn and in the home straight.

runners.formComment: Won at Taree Super Track over 300m two starts back but then was a little disappointing last start, fading at the end of 300m at Taree Super Track. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels contacted in the back straight and lost ground.
